notes: WS1 spike (#670): pi/Haiku decomposed /ping, merged unreviewed to main with full creds; reverted in #862. The lesson that birthed the reports-only-first rule (#867). Seed datapoint — outcome:reverted is the gold negative signal.

Press-play: FIRST pi.dev code-writing run end-to-end on mac-mini (#1005/#669). Worker wrote a script, opened PR #1015 (Closes #1014), push cascaded CI green, bot-guard+artifact-gate held. outcome=abandoned because it was an intentional throwaway proof (PR closed unmerged), NOT a quality failure.
